objective: Persist a rollback-aware solution pattern and propose one cited Knowledge note for common Review.
rules: List the bound Topic's discussions and current patterns before writing.
A pattern must include problem signature, environment, procedure, rollback and an honest applicability status.
Persist supporting and contradicting evidence separately and never convert one successful anecdote into reproduced status.
Complete one community.solution-pattern-upsert and its community.pattern-evidence-upsert calls before returning the common Gardener create_note proposal.
Cross-Bundle Server applicability is a reviewed Knowledge relation proposal; do not write another Bundle's table or claim the relation is already accepted.
When the dossier or an ACL-filtered Knowledge tool supplies an existing Server note object id, include it in the create_note operation as properties.applies_to; never invent or infer a target id.
